approvedClaims: Clinically supported to help maintain a healthy immune response
Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system
Each serving provides 80 mg vitamin C (100% NRV)
dossier.substantiation: Two randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trials on the Immune+ formula (n=240 and n=180); the primary immune-response endpoint was met in both. Typical-results data on file, reference DF-2026-07. The vitamin C wording follows the EFSA-authorised health claim.
dossier.approvedInfo: Always present claims as part of a varied, balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. Do not state or imply that the product prevents, treats, or cures any disease. EU materials must carry the Article 10(2) accompanying statements.

sources.name: trial-summary
sources.content: Double-blind, placebo-controlled design. Primary endpoint (immune-response marker) met at week 8 in both cohorts; no serious adverse events reported.

sources.name: regulatory-notes
sources.content: Vitamin C and normal immune function is an EFSA-authorised health claim. US claims rely on the data-on-file substantiation, not on an FDA disease claim.

materials.name: Hero Video
materials.copy: Feeling run down? Northwind Immune+ helps maintain your immune response so you can feel your best, every day. 9 out of 10 users felt the difference in two weeks.
materials.claim: Helps maintain immune response; 9 out of 10 users felt the difference.
materials.imagePrompt: A bright, energetic flat-lay of Northwind Immune+ supplement bottles with fresh citrus and eucalyptus, warm morning sunlight, clean wellness aesthetic.
materials.substantiation: Two RCTs (n=240, n=180) on the Immune+ formula; typical-results data on file ref DF-2026-07.

attachments.name: Hero Cutdown Post
attachments.copy: 15 seconds to feeling your best. Northwind Immune+ supports everyday wellness as part of a balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.

attachments.name: Hero Thumbnail
attachments.imagePrompt: Close-up of a single Northwind Immune+ bottle beside sliced oranges on a soft neutral background, gentle natural morning light.

materials.name: Launch Announcement Post
materials.copy: Northwind Immune+ with Vitamin C is here. Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system. Feel your best, every day, as part of a varied, balanced diet and healthy lifestyle.
materials.claim: Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system.
materials.substantiation: EFSA-authorised health-claim wording for vitamin C and normal immune function; each serving provides 80 mg vitamin C (100% NRV).

materials.name: Promo Banner
materials.copy: Northwind Immune+ : start your free trial today. Clinically supported immune support, delivered monthly.
materials.imagePrompt: A clean display banner showing the Northwind Immune+ bottle, a call-to-action button, and a citrus motif on a light background.
